name: Dr. Priya Ramaswamy
title: Assistant Professor
department: Department of Chemical and Biomedical Engineering

constraints.additional_duties: Pre-tenure, research expectations: 2 publications/year. Teaching evaluations critical.

accreditation_notes: ABET-accredited Chemical Engineering program with rigid outcome mapping.
motivation: Student feedback consistently says 'too theoretical, not enough real-world application.' Wants to add process simulation (Aspen Plus) but unsure how to fit within existing 15-week schedule.
